original_statement: which island has the most area, tiree or kasos?
mutated_statement: which something does more, this one or that one?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Delexicalization + Measure vagueness: Specific category and names generalized and replaced by deictic pronouns | "island" → "something" | "tiree" → "this one" | "kasos" → "that one" | "has the most area" → "does more" (which island has the most area, tiree or kasos? → which something does more, this one or that one?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的chain中select的simple_query里可见agent给出“Cannot be determined”并在thought中写道“问题是模糊的……无法确定”，judge_thought也明确指出“问题是模糊且缺少指定实体和度量，因此无法从表中回答”。由此可见，agent明确识别出问题的不确定性与歧义，未在缺乏关键信息的情况下给出具体比较结果，而是直接说明无法确定。基于这些证据，agent的行为符合“意识到目标模糊且未给出答案、明确指出需要更多信息或无法回答”的分类。
